content.description: Renders widget-radio-group items as radio buttons for single-selection from static options.
content.hob:
;; Widget Radio Group View — radio buttons for single-selection from static options

(let [label-text (get-in item [:content :label])
      options (or (get-in item [:content :options]) [])
      default-val (get-in item [:content :defaultValue])
      state-key (get-in item [:content :stateKey])
      group-name (str "radio-" (:id item))
      horizontal (= (get-in item [:content :layout]) "horizontal")
      pc (get api :pageContext)

      ;; Initialize state with default value
      _ (when (and default-val state-key pc)
          (invoke pc "setState" state-key default-val))

      ;; Styles
      s-label "font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #aaa);"
      s-row "display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8125rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius, 4px);"
      s-empty "color: var(--color-text-secondary, #888); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-style: italic;"

      hover-enter (fn [e] (dom-set! (dom-get (get e :currentTarget) :style) :background "var(--color-bg-hover, rgba(255,255,255,0.05))"))
      hover-leave (fn [e] (dom-set! (dom-get (get e :currentTarget) :style) :background ""))]

  [:div {}
    ;; Optional label
    (when label-text
      [:div {:style s-label} label-text])

    ;; Radio buttons
    (if (seq options)
      [:div {:style (str "display: flex; flex-direction: " (if horizontal "row" "column")
                         "; gap: " (if horizontal "12px" "2px") ";"
                         (if horizontal " flex-wrap: wrap;" ""))}
        (for [opt options]
          (let [val (get opt :value)
                lbl (or (get opt :label) val)]
            [:label {:style s-row
                     :on-mouseenter hover-enter
                     :on-mouseleave hover-leave}
              [:input {:type "radio"
                       :name group-name
                       :value val
                       :checked (= val default-val)
                       :style "cursor: pointer;"
                       :on-change (fn [e]
                         (when (and state-key pc)
                           (invoke pc "setState" state-key val)))}]
              [:span {} lbl]]))]

      ;; Empty state
      [:div {:style s-empty} "No options configured"])])
